hero.description: Upload your meeting. Get a clear summary, decisions, tasks, and next steps.
hero.microcopy: No sign up. Start in seconds.

how.title: Three simple steps.
how.subtitle: From meeting to clarity in minutes.

benefits.title: Everything you need after every meeting.
benefits.subtitle: Receive a structured executive report with everything already organized.

summary.title: Executive Summary
summary.p1: Leadership aligned on the Q3 strategic roadmap, confirming priorities, ownership of key initiatives and the Beta release timeline.
summary.p2: Focus areas include onboarding improvements, analytics and go-to-market readiness.

why.title: Why MeetMind?
why.subtitle: Less noise after meetings. More clarity for the next step.

card1.title: Stop searching through recordings.
card1.text: Know exactly what happened without replaying the entire conversation.

card2.title: Never miss a decision.
card2.text: Every key decision is captured and separated from discussion noise.

card3.title: Always know the next step.
card3.text: Tasks, owners and deadlines are ready to review and share.

card4.title: Stay ahead of risks.
card4.text: Potential blockers are surfaced before they turn into problems.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: The essentials before your first upload.
faq.a1: MP3, M4A, MP4, WAV, WEBM and OGG.
faq.q2: Where do I receive the result?
faq.a2: The final executive report and transcript are delivered directly in Telegram.
faq.q3: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a3: No. MeetMind AI works through Telegram and a Telegram Mini App.
faq.q4: Can I try it for free?
faq.a4: Yes. Open the bot and upload your first meeting recording.

finalCta.title: Ready for your next meeting?
finalCta.subtitle: Try MeetMind AI for free.
finalCta.microcopy: No installation required. Works inside Telegram.
